summary: Iteration 6 — Frontend-only verification of M365 admin rewrite from delegated OAuth to App-Only client_credentials flow. All 9 acceptance criteria pass: page renders with new header, status pill, recommendation banner, 5 fields with correct testids + helper text, eye toggle on secret, only 2 buttons (no Connect, no redirect URI block), 7-step setup guide, save flow with toast + saved chip + cleared input on reload, mask preservation when changing only sender_email, and Test Connection surfaces the real Azure AADSTS53003 error in a red inline message.
critical_code_review_comments: Microsoft365Admin.jsx is clean (187 lines), pure App-Only flow, no OAuth artifacts. Old endpoints (/oauth/start, /oauth/callback, /redirect-uri, /disconnect) confirmed removed from UI calls.

Mask preservation correctly implemented: buildBody() sends secretInput if user typed, else falls back to secretOnFile (the masked placeholder), and the backend merges-preserve when it sees the mask — verified end-to-end (chip stayed '••••EFGH' after changing only sender_email).
Setup guide labelled '5-minute Azure setup' (not '7-step setup guide') but DOES contain exactly 7 numbered <li> items as required.
Inline test error styling: rgb(185, 28, 28) = red-700 — good contrast, AlertCircle icon. Toast also surfaces via authErrorToast helper.
seed_data_creation: Re-saved test config: tenant_id='common', client_id='00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000001234', client_secret='TEST-SECRET-ABCDEFGH' (saved → chip shows '••••EFGH'), sender_email='test-sender@paneltec.com.au'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M365 admin is fully migrated to App-Only client_credentials. Verified data-testids: m365-admin, m365-status-pill, m365-recommendation, m365-tenant, m365-client-id, m365-secret (type=password with eye toggle), m365-secret-saved (chip), m365-sender, m365-reply-to, m365-save (bg #2C6BFF / rgb(44,107,255), label 'SAVE CREDENTIALS'), m365-test-connection (outlined navy, label 'TEST CONNECTION'), m365-setup-guide (7 li steps), m365-test-msg (red rgb(185,28,28) inline error with Azure AADSTS text). No Connect button, no redirect-uri block, no '?connected=1' handling. Backend POST /test-connection returns real Azure error AADSTS53003 with the dummy creds — that's the expected, correct outcome and proves the client_credentials flow hits login.microsoftonline.com.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration was an acceptance test of a feature rewrite (delegated OAuth → App-Only client_credentials), not a bug-fix. All acceptance criteria in the review request were met.
